title: Acuite Ratings Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Acuite Ratings Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Acuite Ratings Holdings Services in Varanasi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Acuite Ratings Holdings Services:
Acuite Ratings Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Acuite Ratings Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
